# Login to user 5 and then accept all network requests (users 1-4)
1
user5
User5!
7 # View network (empty)
5
1 # Accept user 1's request
7 # View network (user 1 should be in network)
5
1 # Accept user 2's request
7 # View network (users 1 and 2 should be in network)
5
1 # Accept user 3's request
7 # View network (users 1-3 should be in network)
5
1 # Accept user 4's request
7 # View network (users 1-4 should be in network)
